message:
Add folder selection support for Lance datasets

- Change file input to accept directories (webkitdirectory)
- Add handleLanceFiles() to process files from directory selection
- Add handleLanceFolder() for drag-and-drop folder support
- Add parseManifestForColumnNames() to extract column names from
  _versions/*.manifest protobuf files
- Update processLanceFile() to accept and use column names
- Update UI to show actual column names instead of column_N

Per Lance spec, schema/column names are stored in manifest files,
not in the data files themselves.
